content.en:
Soon.

The first genius of the alliance between Wind Tooth Island and Immortal Island appeared and began to fight.

Thundered!!!!!

The two other shore-level geniuses went all out, and all kinds of other side magic skills were displayed, and they were also part of the golden body of the other side.

The two of them were about the same strength as each other, so they fought for a long time before finally separating the winner.

In the first game, the other side of the Wind Tooth Island was defeated, but the opponent was also hit hard.

Immediately afterwards, the second Shore-level genius of Fengya Island came on the field and easily defeated the opponent's battered Other-level genius.

In this way, the second Peer-level genius of the Immortal Island Alliance also came on the field.

Time passes slowly.

Wind Tooth Island and the Immortal Island Alliance's other side level geniuses have come and go, you win one, I win one.

Unconsciously, the side of Wind Tooth Island has been eliminated by five, while the other party has only eliminated four.

From this point, it can be seen that the other side level geniuses on the side of Wind Tooth Island are still a little weaker.

But this does not mean anything, nor does it represent the strength of both sides.

"Lord of Infinity, it's your turn!"

The Lord of the Ice and Rain.

"Yes, Lord of Ice and Rain!"

Ye Tian went up.

And the other side's other-level genius was already seriously injured.

Therefore, Ye Tian only used one move to directly eliminate the other party.

Then, the opponent's sixth Shore-level genius came into play.

Then.

The voice of the Lord of Ice and Rain came: "Lord of Endless, don't spare your hands, hit them hard!"

Chen Yang nodded slightly, indicating that he understood.

Rumble!!!!

The golden body on the other side of Xuanyang broke out directly!

The Will of the Origin Realm also burst out.

Immediately after, he pointed his finger at the spear, a weapon of the Origin Rules, attached the Origin Rules of the other side, and killed the genius of the other side.

The opponent's face changed drastically, and he defended with all his might, but he couldn't stop it at all.

With just one blow, the opponent's flesh cracked.

At the critical moment, the Lord of Hao Prison took action to save the life of this genius at the other side, otherwise the other party would definitely not live.

"Complete other side level genius, the will of the origin realm, the origin rules of the other side, and the realm is not low, no wonder the Lord of Ice and Rain you proposed the competition, it turned out to be such a killer feature!"

If he had known this, he would definitely not have agreed.

However, it is said that the generation of Wind Tooth Island does not have any powerful Ninth Bone Transformation Realm Peer-level geniuses, but the latest batch of Peer-level geniuses has been recruited, but he doesn't care about this batch of Peer-level geniuses at all.

As a result, there is such a demonic existence in it.

In short, he made a mistake.

But it is impossible to admit defeat directly.

Subsequently.

The seventh Shore-level genius of the Immortal Island Alliance went up, but was also defeated by Ye Tian with one move.

The eighth place, also defeated by one move.

However, it is ninth.

10th place.

I have to say that the tenth Other-Shore level genius is really powerful, ninety-six of the Golden Body of the Other Shore, the will of the Origin Realm, and also comprehended the Origin Rules of the Other Shore, but the Origin Rules of the Other Shore Realm is not as good as him.

And the golden body on the other side of the ninety percent and six-body body is still very different from his golden body on the other side of Xuanyang.

Rumble!!!!

After a few moves, the other party was not lightly injured.

After a while, Ye Tian easily defeated him.

That's it.

Wind Tooth Island won the game.

"Lord of Hao, this Origin Worm Mother belongs to me, let's go!"

The Lord of Ice and Rain has driven people away.

The eyes of the Lord of Hao Prison were full of annoyance, but he was helpless, so he could only say, "Okay, but the Origin Realm you caught has to be released!"

"No problem!"

The Lord of Ice Rain nodded.

It's just a Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and killing it won't do Wind Tooth Island any good.

Soon.

The Lord of Ice and Rain released the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Immortal Island Alliance.

The Lord of Ice Rain grabbed the Origin Mother and left.

As for using this Origin Worm Mother to find the Origin Worm Hive, it has nothing to do with Ye Tian.

Rain Island.

Ye Tian practiced silently, waiting for news from the Lord of Ice and Rain.

After all, the Lord of Ice and Rain had promised that once he found the Origin Hive, he would be able to gain some resource benefits from it.

He was looking forward to it.

After a while.

The Lord of Ice and Rain informed him of the past.

"Lord of Ice and Rain!"

After Ye Tian saw the Lord of Ice and Rain, he said respectfully.

When the Lord of Ice and Rain saw Ye Tian coming, he said, "After our exploration of Fengya Island, now we have finally found the Origin Worm Hive, and there are a lot of good things in it, you can choose some." "

Soon.

He took Ye Tian to the place where the Origin Worm Hive was located.

It was far away from Wind Tooth Island, but the speed of the Lord of Ice and Rain was fast, I don't know how many times faster than Ye Tian.

So, it didn't take long to get here.

......

"Lord of Ice and Rain, where is the Origin Hive?"

Ye Tian didn't see it.

"Origin nests are hidden, so they are not easy to see. The Lord of Ice and Rain said.

I saw that the Lord of Ice and Rain waved his hand and hit the Origin Worm Hive.

The next moment.

The Origin Hive is revealed.

Followed by.

The Lord of Ice and Rain took Ye Tian into this Origin Hive.

The inside of the Origin Hive is large, but there is not a single Mother of Origin here.

At this time, the Lord of Ice and Rain explained, "There are more than a dozen Origin Worm Mothers here in the Origin, and after we find this place, we will kill the Origin Worm Mother, because they have no value left. "

"There are a lot of resources found here so far, and I think the value that will be useful to you is the three resources of Origin Insect Pulp, Ziling Gold Liquid, and Eternal Mother Liquor, you can take some of them separately. The Lord of Ice and Rain suggested.

Ye Tian didn't know about these resources, so he was curious to ask for advice.

"The size of the Lord of Ice and Rain, what is the use of these three resources?"

The Lord of Ice and Rain introduced, "The Origin Insect Pulp can be used to refine your Golden Bone on the other side and quickly improve your cultivation. Ziling Gold Liquid, which can be used to increase the will of the Origin Realm. As for the Eternal Mother Liquor, it is even more precious, and it can assist in comprehending the original rules of the other side, and the effect is quite good. When you build the Origin Circle in the future, you can cultivate with the Eternal Mother Liquid, and the effect is quite good. "The Lord of Ice and Rain.

"Good stuff indeed!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

Subsequently.

The Lord of Ice and Rain collected these three resources from here and gave Ye Tian some.

It's not a lot, but it's definitely not a small amount.

Besides, he's only been fighting for a few games, so it's good to have those resources.

Like other other geniuses, although they have also been dealt with, it is estimated that there is no good reward.

Therefore, he must not be too greedy.

Subsequently.

He was taken back by the Lord of Ice and Rain, otherwise it would take a long time for him to fly back by himself, and it would even be a little unsafe.
